\tzpentry{ID3547}{Quantum Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3547 introduces Quantum Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \phi_x(x_2)\propto \int A(p)\,e^{\tfrac{i}{\hbar}p(x-x_2+x_0)}\,dp\ \times\ G_\ell(x-x_2,\sigma_r), \]
